title: Move Meshtastic BLE behind app owner
description: Refactor Meshtastic BLE compatibility so advertising, connection callbacks, and restart are owned by the shared BLE app owner while preserving ToRadio/FromRadio/FromNum semantics, queue limits, FromNum notification, and session_epoch stale-response guards.
acceptance_criteria: meshtastic_ble and meshtastic_gateway_adapter native_sim/Twister tests pass; added tests cover owner-managed disconnect cleanup and stale session rejection; no physical app evidence required.
notes:
Implemented Meshtastic BLE owner migration for no-hardware scope. ble_meshtastic no longer owns a private bt_conn pointer or BT_CONN_CB_DEFINE; connection callbacks are registered through ble_app_owner, notify_from_num() borrows/releases the owner-managed Meshtastic connection, and ToRadio write validation compares non-null GATT connections against ble_app_owner_conn_ref(). Meshtastic keeps its protocol-local session epoch, active flag, queues, partial read state, FromNum state, and restart policy.

Tests added/updated in lichen/tests/meshtastic_ble: init asserts owner callback registration; owner-dispatched connect creates owner-held connection and active session; matching ToRadio writes enqueue with the connection's epoch; stale connection writes are rejected; stale disconnects do not reset queues or restart advertising; matching disconnect clears active session, bumps epoch, drains queues, and restarts advertising; reconnect rejects old-connection writes and accepts new-connection writes. Existing meshtastic_gateway_adapter coverage remained green.

Reviews: explorer Huygens mapped remaining ownership and recommended owner callback/ref migration plus native_sim coverage. Mencius review found no P0/P1/P2 and one P3 that older parser-only NULL ztest helpers still bypass owner state. Anscombe review found no P0/P1/P2 and one P3 that notify_from_num() owner ref path is not directly exercised because FromNum notifications are not enabled in tests. Created follow-up project-LICHEN-t2hn.22.3.1 for both P3 coverage gaps.

Review validation: Anscombe additionally ran EC2 direct builds/runs: west build -b native_sim -d build/meshtastic_ble_review lichen/tests/meshtastic_ble -t run passed 11/11, and west build -b native_sim -d build/meshtastic_gateway_adapter_review lichen/tests/meshtastic_gateway_adapter -- -DZEPHYR_EXTRA_MODULES=/Users/markatwood/Desktop/Projects/project-LICHEN/lichen then west build -d build/meshtastic_gateway_adapter_review -t run passed 22/22.

Local/static check: git diff --check passed.

EC2 validation on i-05e27e074db786e22 using EBS vol-0875d0df8bdf82a58 mounted at /mnt/lichen-zephyr, clean worktree /mnt/lichen-zephyr/work/project-LICHEN-t2hn65-validate:
  git fetch origin main
  git reset --hard origin/main
  git clean -fdx
  git apply /tmp/t2hn22-3-meshtastic-owner.patch

  west twister -T lichen/tests/meshtastic_ble -T lichen/tests/meshtastic_gateway_adapter -T lichen/tests/ble_app_owner -p native_sim --inline-logs --outdir twister-out-t2hn22-3 --extra-args ZEPHYR_EXTRA_MODULES=/mnt/lichen-zephyr/work/project-LICHEN-t2hn65-validate/lichen
